title: Zero In Ultra Power – Household Pest Killer Aerosol with Trigger – Indoor Bug Spray - Professional Strength Insect Killer Spray – All Household Insects – Long-lasting Protection – 600ml (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack

PROFESSIONAL-GRADE PEST CONTROL – This pest killer delivers fast, effective action against household pests, including fleas, bed bugs, and moths. The expert strength formula ensures maximum impact and eradication for a pest-free home. Ideal for indoor use

LONG-LASTING PROTECTION – Experience long-lasting protection with the advanced Cyphenothrin and Prallethrin formula to maximise knockdown speed. This bug killer eliminates pests on contact and prevents reinfestation, enjoy up to 4 weeks pest treatment

RAPID & RELIABLE ACTION – The aerosol insecticide spray is easily applied on all surfaces. Use as a space spray to kill moths directly or to treat a whole room by spraying a 4-5 second burst into the room. Has a non-staining, low odour finish

PRECISION TRIGGER HANDLE – Equipped with a built-in ergonomic trigger handle for a powerful, accurate insect spray for home and commercial settings. Ideal for targeting hard-to-reach areas and it keeps your skin free from contact

ULTRA POWER INSECT CONTROL – Our high-performance Ultra Power products from Zero In deliver fast and effective results every time - just like the professional’s use. As experts in insect control for over 25 years, we’ll take care of your pest problems
